sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, value String, numbers Array(Int32), nested Tuple(String, Array(String)));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'test', [1, 2, 3], ('foo', ['bar', 'baz'])), (2, NULL, [4, 5, NULL], ('test', [])), (3, 'example', [], ('example', ['example1', 'example2']));
SELECT gccMurmurHash(value, gccMurmurHash(numbers)) AS hash_value FROM test_table WHERE id BETWEEN 1 AND 3;
SELECT id, gccMurmurHash(nested) AS nested_hash FROM (SELECT id, nested FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) WHERE id BETWEEN 1 AND 2;

SELECT id, gccMurmurHash(value, (SELECT max(id) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL)) AS combined_hash FROM test_table WHERE id BETWEEN (SELECT min(id) FROM test_table) AND (SELECT max(id) FROM test_table);
SELECT id, gccMurmurHash(NULLIF(value, 'test'), numbers) AS computed_hash FROM test_table WHERE id BETWEEN 1 AND 3;
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id UInt64, data String, timestamp DateTime);
INSERT INTO another_table VALUES (1, 'data1', now()), (2, 'data2', now()), (3, 'data3', NULL);
SELECT a.id, gccMurmurHash(a.value, b.data) AS combined_hash FROM test_table AS a JOIN another_table AS b ON a.id = b.ref_id WHERE a.id BETWEEN 1 AND 3;
SELECT id, gccMurmurHash(arrayMap(x -> x + 1, numbers)) AS incremented_hash FROM test_table HAVING id BETWEEN 1 AND (SELECT max(id) FROM test_table);
CREATE TABLE temp_table (temp_id Int32, temp_value String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT temp_id, gccMurmurHash(temp_value) AS temp_hash FROM temp_table WHERE temp_id BETWEEN 1 AND (SELECT count(*) FROM temp_table WHERE temp_value IS NOT NULL);
